nodes.name: Webhook: Receive Incident
nodes.notes: Accepts incident JSON from any of 14 source systems. Expected fields: incident_id, source_system, description, timestamp.

nodes.name: ML Classify
nodes.notes: Calls sklearn multi-label classifier. Returns: affected_system, severity_tier, owning_team.

nodes.name: Agent 1: Triage
nodes.notes: Few-shot triage agent. Reconciles ML output with LLM analysis. Outputs structured JSON with confidence score.

nodes.name: Low Confidence?
nodes.notes:
TRUE (output 0): confidence < 0.7 → send to Agent 2 Investigator.
FALSE (output 1): confidence >= 0.7 → skip to Retrieve Runbooks.

nodes.name: Retrieve Similar Incidents

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.description, top_k: 3, filter_type: 'incident' }) }}

nodes.notes: Fetches top-3 similar past incidents from FAISS/ChromaDB for chain-of-thought grounding.

nodes.name: Agent 2: Investigator
nodes.notes: Chain-of-thought investigator. Only runs when Agent 1 confidence < 0.7. Re-outputs the same JSON schema with updated confidence.

nodes.name: Retrieve Runbooks

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.description, top_k: 3, filter_type: 'runbook' }) }}

nodes.notes: Fetches top-3 runbook chunks from FAISS/ChromaDB. Receives from both confidence branches.

nodes.name: Agent 3: Remediation Planner
nodes.notes: RAG-grounded remediation planner. All steps cite runbook IDs. Also receives retried input from Agent 4 feedback loop.

nodes.name: Agent 4: LLM Judge
nodes.notes: LLM-as-judge. Scores playbook on groundedness, completeness, safety, specificity. If average_score < 7, triggers one retry.

nodes.name: Score Acceptable?
nodes.notes:
TRUE (output 0): avg >= 7 → proceed to routing.
FALSE (output 1): avg < 7 → retry Agent 3 once with judge feedback.

nodes.name: Agent 3: Retry with Feedback
nodes.notes: One-time retry. Prevents infinite loops. Feeds back into Route by Severity.

nodes.name: Route by Severity
nodes.notes: Routes by severity. Receives from both Score Acceptable (pass) and Agent 3 Retry.

nodes.name: P1: Slack + PagerDuty

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: '#incidents-war-room', text: '🚨 *P1 CRITICAL* — ' + $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.description + '\nIncident ID: ' + $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.incident_id + '\nTeam: ' + JSON.parse($('Agent 1: Triage').item.json.choices[0].message.content).owning_team }) }}

nodes.notes: Sends to #incidents-war-room. In production, add a second HTTP Request node to fire PagerDuty webhook (use webhook.site as mock during capstone).

nodes.name: P2: Slack + Jira

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: '#incidents', text: '⚠️ *P2 HIGH* — ' + $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.description + '\nIncident ID: ' + $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.incident_id + '\nTeam: ' + JSON.parse($('Agent 1: Triage').item.json.choices[0].message.content).owning_team }) }}

nodes.notes: Sends Slack alert to team channel. In production, chain a second HTTP Request to create a Jira ticket via Jira REST API.

nodes.name: P3: Create Jira Ticket

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { project: { key: 'OPS' }, summary: '[P3] ' + $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.description, description: { type: 'doc', version: 1, content: [{ type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.description }] }] }, issuetype: { name: 'Bug' }, priority: { name: 'Medium' } } }) }}

nodes.notes: Creates Jira ticket in OPS project. Requires JIRA_API_URL env var and basic auth credentials.

nodes.name: P4: Auto-Close

assignments.name: resolution
assignments.value: ={{ 'Low priority incident auto-resolved by AI. System: ' + JSON.parse($('Agent 1: Triage').item.json.choices[0].message.content).affected_system }}

nodes.notes: Auto-closes P4 low-priority incidents. Sets status, AI-drafted resolution, and timestamp.

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheets

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ incident_id: $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.incident_id, source_system: $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.source_system, severity: JSON.parse($('Agent 1: Triage').item.json.choices[0].message.content).severity, affected_system: JSON.parse($('Agent 1: Triage').item.json.choices[0].message.content).affected_system, owning_team: JSON.parse($('Agent 1: Triage').item.json.choices[0].message.content).owning_team, triage_confidence: JSON.parse($('Agent 1: Triage').item.json.choices[0].message.content).confidence, judge_avg_score: JSON.parse($('Agent 4: LLM Judge').item.json.choices[0].message.content).average_score, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: Logs audit trail: incident ID, severity, confidence, judge score, timestamp. Connect all 4 routing branches to this node.

nodes.name: Webhook Response

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ incident_id: $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.incident_id, status: 'processed', severity: JSON.parse($('Agent 1: Triage').item.json.choices[0].message.content).severity, affected_system: JSON.parse($('Agent 1: Triage').item.json.choices[0].message.content).affected_system, owning_team: JSON.parse($('Agent 1: Triage').item.json.choices[0].message.content).owning_team, triage_confidence: JSON.parse($('Agent 1: Triage').item.json.choices[0].message.content).confidence, judge_score: JSON.parse($('Agent 4: LLM Judge').item.json.choices[0].message.content).average_score, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: Returns full audit trail JSON to the caller.

env_vars_required: PYTHON_SERVICE_URL  — ngrok HTTPS URL for your FastAPI service (e.g. https://xxxx.ngrok-free.app)
SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL   — Incoming webhook URL from your Slack app
JIRA_API_URL        — Base URL of your Jira instance (e.g. https://yourorg.atlassian.net)
GOOGLE_SHEETS_WEBHOOK_URL — Google Apps Script web app URL to append rows
credentials_required: Groq API Key  — HTTP Header Auth: Header Name = Authorization, Value = Bearer <your-groq-key>
Jira Basic Auth — HTTP Basic Auth: email + API token
flow_summary: 3. Agent 1 Triage → Groq LLM (few-shot) reconciles ML + LLM
7. Agent 4 LLM Judge → scores playbook on 4 dimensions
8. IF avg score < 7 → Agent 3 Retry with judge feedback (max 1 retry)
10. Log to Google Sheets → audit trail
11. Webhook Response → returns JSON audit trail
